<p class="key-answer" data-question="Anagrelide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Anagrelide</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Anagrelide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xagrid is indicated for the reduction of elevated platelet counts in at-risk essential-thrombocythaemia (ET) patients who are intolerant to their current therapy or whose elevated platelet counts are...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>familial thrombocytosis（99.9%）</li>
<li>reactive thrombocytosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>inverse Klippel-Trenaunay syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>thrombocythemia（99.5%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（98.9%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.9%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis（98.5%）</li>
<li>juvenile idiopathic arthritis（98.5%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis（98.5%）</li>
<li>pseudoachondroplasia（98.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/anagrelide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
